name: BlueLinx Holdings Inc.
summary: BlueLinx Holdings Inc. is a leading wholesale two-step distributor of residential and commercial building products in the United States. It purchases products from manufacturers and distributes them to dealers, pro dealers, national home centers, cooperatives, and specialty distributors. Its portfolio spans specialty products (engineered wood, siding, millwork, outdoor living, industrial) and structural products (lumber, plywood, OSB, rebar, remesh), serving all 50 U.S. states from 57 branch cities.
